prompt: A deadlines board grouping clients by urgency — filing deadline this week, this month, and later — with each client's document progress on their card.
wire:
export default function DeadlinesBoard() { const [clients, setClients] = React.useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = React.useState(true); React.useEffect(() => { tools.host_listDeadlines({}).then((r) => { setClients(r.data || []); setLoading(false); }); }, []); const NOW = new Date("2026-07-21"); const endOfWeek = new Date(NOW); endOfWeek.setDate(NOW.getDate() + (7 - NOW.getDay())); const endOfMonth = new Date(NOW.getFullYear(), NOW.getMonth() + 1, 0); function bucket(client) { const d = new Date(client.filingDeadline || client.deadline || ""); if (isNaN(d)) return "later"; if (d <= endOfWeek) return "week"; if (d <= endOfMonth) return "month"; return "later"; } function daysAway(dateStr) { const d = new Date(dateStr); if (isNaN(d)) return null; return Math.round((d - NOW) / 86400000); } function deadlineLabel(dateStr) { const days = daysAway(dateStr); if (days === null) return "—"; if (days < 0) return `${Math.abs(days)}d overdue`; if (days === 0) return "Today"; if (days === 1) return "Tomorrow"; return `${days} days away`; } function deadlineTone(dateStr) { const days = daysAway(dateStr); if (days === null) return "neutral"; if (days <= 0) return "overdue"; if (days <= 7) return "missing"; if (days <= 31) return "review"; return "neutral"; } const week = clients.filter(c => bucket(c) === "week"); const month = clients.filter(c => bucket(c) === "month"); const later = clients.filter(c => bucket(c) === "later"); const cardStyle = { background: "var(--vendo-color-surface)", border: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-medium)", padding: "14px 16px", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 10, fontFamily: "var(--vendo-font-family)", }; const sectionHeaderStyle = (tone) => ({ fontFamily: "var(--vendo-font-family)", fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 600, letterSpacing: "0.04em", textTransform: "uppercase", color: tone === "danger" ? "var(--vendo-color-danger)" : tone === "warning" ? "#b45309" : "var(--vendo-color-muted)", marginBottom: 4, }); const emptyStyle = { fontFamily: "var(--vendo-font-family)", fontSize: 14, color: "var(--vendo-color-muted)", padding: "12px 0", }; function progressPct(client) { const received = client.documentsReceived ?? client.docsReceived ?? 0; const total = client.documentsTotal ?? client.docsTotal ?? 0; if (!total) return null; return { received, total, pct: Math.round((received / total) * 100) }; } function missingKinds(client) { const kinds = client.missingDocumentKinds || client.missingKinds || []; return kinds.slice(0, 3).join(", ") + (kinds.length > 3 ? ` +${kinds.length - 3} more` : ""); } function ClientCard({ client }) { const prog = progressPct(client); const dl = client.filingDeadline || client.deadline || ""; const days = daysAway(dl); const tone = deadlineTone(dl); const badgeColors = { overdue: { bg: "#fef2f2", color: "var(--vendo-color-danger)", border: "#fecaca" }, missing: { bg: "#fff7ed", color: "#b45309", border: "#fed7aa" }, review: { bg: "#fffbeb", color: "#92400e", border: "#fde68a" }, neutral: { bg: "var(--vendo-color-background)", color: "var(--vendo-color-muted)", border: "var(--vendo-color-border)" }, }; const bc = badgeColors[tone] || badgeColors.neutral; return (
{client.name || client.clientName || "—"}
{client.entityType && (
{client.entityType}
)}
{deadlineLabel(dl)}
{dl && (
Filing deadline: {new Date(dl).toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric", year: "numeric" })}
)} {prog !== null && (
Documents collected {prog.received} of {prog.total}
)} {client.assignedStaff && (
Assigned: {client.assignedStaff}
)} {missingKinds(client) && (
Missing: {missingKinds(client)}
)}
); } function Section({ title, clients, tone, emptyMsg }) { return (
{title} {clients.length}
{clients.length === 0 ?
{emptyMsg}
:
{clients.map((c, i) => )}
}
); } if (loading) { return (
Loading deadlines…
); } return (
); }
